<div class="jp-Collapser jp-InputCollapser jp-Cell-inputCollapser">
</div>
<div class="jp-InputArea jp-Cell-inputArea">
<div class="jp-InputPrompt jp-InputArea-prompt">In [5]:</div>
<div class="jp-CodeMirrorEditor jp-Editor jp-InputArea-editor" data-type="inline">
<div class="cm-editor cm-s-jupyter">
<div class="highlight hl-ipython3"><pre><span></span><span class="n">features</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span>
    <span class="s1">'engagement_score'</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s1">'view_count'</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s1">'like_count'</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s1">'comment_count'</span>
<span class="p">]</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="jp-Cell jp-MarkdownCell jp-Notebook-cell" id="cell-id=947e010682754a15">
<div class="jp-Cell-inputWrapper" tabindex="0">
<div class="jp-Collapser jp-InputCollapser jp-Cell-inputCollapser">
</div>
<div class="jp-InputArea jp-Cell-inputArea"><div class="jp-InputPrompt jp-InputArea-prompt">
</div><div class="jp-RenderedHTMLCommon jp-RenderedMarkdown jp-MarkdownOutput" data-mime-type="text/markdown">
<p>De ruwe aantallen views, likes en comments zijn sterk scheef verdeeld.</p>
<p>Daarom pas ik:</p>
<p>een log-transformatie (np.log1p) toe om extreme waarden in te perken;</p>
<p>winsorizing (1e–96e percentiel) om extreme uitschieters te clippen;</p>
<p>een RobustScaler toe om te schalen op basis van median en IQR, zodat het model minder gevoelig is voor outliers.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div><div class="jp-Cell jp-CodeCell jp-Notebook-cell" id="cell-id=c2d0d0041065659b">
<div class="jp-Cell-inputWrapper" tabindex="0">
<div class="jp-Collapser jp-InputCollapser jp-Cell-inputCollapser">
</div>
<div class="jp-InputArea jp-Cell-inputArea">
<div class="jp-InputPrompt jp-InputArea-prompt">In [6]:</div>
<div class="jp-CodeMirrorEditor jp-Editor jp-InputArea-editor" data-type="inline">
<div class="cm-editor cm-s-jupyter">
<div class="highlight hl-ipython3"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">numpy</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="k">as</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">np</span>
<span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">sklearn.preprocessing</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">RobustScaler</span>

<span class="n">X</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">features</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">astype</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">float</span><span class="p">)</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">copy</span><span class="p">()</span>


<span class="c1"># Missing values</span>
<span class="n">X</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">X</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">fillna</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">X</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">X</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">replace</span><span class="p">([</span><span class="n">np</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">inf</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">-</span><span class="n">np</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">inf</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">col</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">X</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">columns</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">X</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">col</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">np</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">log1p</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">X</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">col</span><span class="p">])</span>

<span class="c1"># Clip extreme outliers (winsorize 1%–99%)</span>
<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">col</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">X</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">columns</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">lower</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">X</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">col</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">quantile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mf">0.01</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">upper</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">X</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">col</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">quantile</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mf">0.96</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">X</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">col</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">X</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">col</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">clip</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">lower</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">upper</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Scale after clipping</span>
<span class="n">scaler</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">RobustScaler</span><span class="p">()</span>
<span class="n">X_scaled</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">scaler</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">fit_transform</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">X</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"Voorbewerking klaar."</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="jp-Cell-outputWrapper">
<div class="jp-Collapser jp-OutputCollapser jp-Cell-outputCollapser">
</div>
<div class="jp-OutputArea jp-Cell-outputArea">
<div class="jp-OutputArea-child">
<div class="jp-OutputPrompt jp-OutputArea-prompt"></div>
<div class="jp-RenderedText jp-OutputArea-output" data-mime-type="text/plain" tabindex="0">
<pre>Voorbewerking klaar.
</pre>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="jp-Cell jp-MarkdownCell jp-Notebook-cell" id="cell-id=74fe1080e5979ee8">
<div class="jp-Cell-inputWrapper" tabindex="0">
<div class="jp-Collapser jp-InputCollapser jp-Cell-inputCollapser">
</div>
<div class="jp-InputArea jp-Cell-inputArea"><div class="jp-InputPrompt jp-InputArea-prompt">
</div><div class="jp-RenderedHTMLCommon jp-RenderedMarkdown jp-MarkdownOutput" data-mime-type="text/markdown">
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="jp-Cell jp-MarkdownCell jp-Notebook-cell" id="cell-id=ca0f80b824317b8e">
<div class="jp-Cell-inputWrapper" tabindex="0">
<div class="jp-Collapser jp-InputCollapser jp-Cell-inputCollapser">
</div>
<div class="jp-InputArea jp-Cell-inputArea"><div class="jp-InputPrompt jp-InputArea-prompt">
</div><div class="jp-RenderedHTMLCommon jp-RenderedMarkdown jp-MarkdownOutput" data-mime-type="text/markdown">
<p>2e traininsfase, deze keer met gewichten</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div><div class="jp-Cell jp-CodeCell jp-Notebook-cell jp-mod-noOutputs" id="cell-id=3bbb3d40a1041829">
<div class="jp-Cell-inputWrapper" tabindex="0">
<div class="jp-Collapser jp-InputCollapser jp-Cell-inputCollapser">
</div>
<div class="jp-InputArea jp-Cell-inputArea">
<div class="jp-InputPrompt jp-InputArea-prompt">In [7]:</div>
<div class="jp-CodeMirrorEditor jp-Editor jp-InputArea-editor" data-type="inline">
<div class="cm-editor cm-s-jupyter">
<div class="highlight hl-ipython3"><pre><span></span><span class="n">weights_phase2</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">np</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">array</span><span class="p">([</span>
    <span class="mf">2.0</span><span class="p">,</span>  <span class="c1"># engagement_score</span>
    <span class="mf">1.5</span><span class="p">,</span>  <span class="c1"># view_count</span>
    <span class="mf">0.2</span><span class="p">,</span>  <span class="c1"># like_count</span>
    <span class="mf">0.2</span>   <span class="c1"># comment_count</span>
<span class="p">])</span>

<span class="n">X_weighted</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">X_scaled</span> <span class="o">*</span> <span class="n">weights_phase2</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="jp-Cell jp-MarkdownCell jp-Notebook-cell" id="cell-id=1440ca59536e7454">
<div class="jp-Cell-inputWrapper" tabindex="0">
<div class="jp-Collapser jp-InputCollapser jp-Cell-inputCollapser">
</div>
<div class="jp-InputArea jp-Cell-inputArea"><div class="jp-InputPrompt jp-InputArea-prompt">
</div><div class="jp-RenderedHTMLCommon jp-RenderedMarkdown jp-MarkdownOutput" data-mime-type="text/markdown">
<p>Kmeans uitvoeren, 3 clusters want er zijn er 3. voor beide fases.</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div><div class="jp-Cell jp-CodeCell jp-Notebook-cell" id="cell-id=15b6af40521da7a6">
<div class="jp-Cell-inputWrapper" tabindex="0">
<div class="jp-Collapser jp-InputCollapser jp-Cell-inputCollapser">
</div>
<div class="jp-InputArea jp-Cell-inputArea">
<div class="jp-InputPrompt jp-InputArea-prompt">In [8]:</div>
<div class="jp-CodeMirrorEditor jp-Editor jp-InputArea-editor" data-type="inline">
<div class="cm-editor cm-s-jupyter">
<div class="highlight hl-ipython3"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">sklearn.cluster</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">KMeans</span>

<span class="c1"># KMeans clustering</span>
<span class="n">kmeans_phase1</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">KMeans</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">n_clusters</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">3</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">random_state</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">42</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">n_init</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">50</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">max_iter</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1000</span>
<span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># pas KMeans toe en sla labels op</span>
<span class="n">labels_phase1</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">kmeans_phase1</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">fit_predict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">X_scaled</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">'cluster_label_phase1'</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">labels_phase1</span>

<span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"Trainingsfase 1 – non-weighted clustering voltooid."</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="n">kmeans_phase2</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">KMeans</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">n_clusters</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">3</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">random_state</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">42</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">n_init</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">50</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">max_iter</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">1000</span>
<span class="p">)</span>

<span class="n">labels_phase2</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">kmeans_phase2</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">fit_predict</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">X_weighted</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">"cluster_label_phase2"</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">labels_phase2</span>

<span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"Trainingsfase 2 – weighted clustering voltooid."</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="jp-Cell-outputWrapper">
<div class="jp-Collapser jp-OutputCollapser jp-Cell-outputCollapser">
</div>
<div class="jp-OutputArea jp-Cell-outputArea">
<div class="jp-OutputArea-child">
<div class="jp-OutputPrompt jp-OutputArea-prompt"></div>
<div class="jp-RenderedText jp-OutputArea-output" data-mime-type="text/plain" tabindex="0">
<pre>Trainingsfase 1 – non-weighted clustering voltooid.
Trainingsfase 2 – weighted clustering voltooid.
</pre>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
<div class="jp-Cell jp-MarkdownCell jp-Notebook-cell" id="cell-id=86f0920fc964d81a">
<div class="jp-Cell-inputWrapper" tabindex="0">
<div class="jp-Collapser jp-InputCollapser jp-Cell-inputCollapser">
</div>
<div class="jp-InputArea jp-Cell-inputArea"><div class="jp-InputPrompt jp-InputArea-prompt">
</div><div class="jp-RenderedHTMLCommon jp-RenderedMarkdown jp-MarkdownOutput" data-mime-type="text/markdown">
<p>labels toewijzen:</p>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div><div class="jp-Cell jp-CodeCell jp-Notebook-cell jp-mod-noOutputs" id="cell-id=dcc2aecba4b8cca4">
<div class="jp-Cell-inputWrapper" tabindex="0">
<div class="jp-Collapser jp-InputCollapser jp-Cell-inputCollapser">
</div>
<div class="jp-InputArea jp-Cell-inputArea">
<div class="jp-InputPrompt jp-InputArea-prompt">In [9]:</div>
<div class="jp-CodeMirrorEditor jp-Editor jp-InputArea-editor" data-type="inline">
<div class="cm-editor cm-s-jupyter">
<div class="highlight hl-ipython3"><pre><span></span><span class="n">X_scaled_df</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">pd</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">DataFrame</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">X_scaled</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">columns</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">X</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">columns</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="n">tmp</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">pd</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">DataFrame</span><span class="p">({</span>
    <span class="s2">"label"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">labels_phase1</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">"engagement_score"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">X_scaled_df</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">"engagement_score"</span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">})</span>

<span class="n">medians_phase1</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">tmp</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">groupby</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"label"</span><span class="p">)[</span><span class="s2">"engagement_score"</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">median</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sort_values</span><span class="p">()</span>

<span class="n">sorted_clusters</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">medians_phase1</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">tolist</span><span class="p">()</span>

<span class="n">label_mapping_phase1</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
    <span class="n">sorted_clusters</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]:</span> <span class="s1">'Low engagement'</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">sorted_clusters</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]:</span> <span class="s1">'Medium engagement'</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">sorted_clusters</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">]:</span> <span class="s1">'High engagement'</span>
<span class="p">}</span>

<span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">'engagement_cluster'</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">'cluster_label_phase1'</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">map</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">label_mapping_phase1</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="n">cat_order</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">'High engagement'</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'Medium engagement'</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s1">'Low engagement'</span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">'engagement_cluster'</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">pd</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">Categorical</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s1">'engagement_cluster'</span><span class="p">],</span> <span class="n">categories</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">cat_order</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">ordered</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span>
<span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div><div class="jp-Cell jp-CodeCell jp-Notebook-cell jp-mod-noOutputs" id="cell-id=6ad452c370ecc928">
<div class="jp-Cell-inputWrapper" tabindex="0">
<div class="jp-Collapser jp-InputCollapser jp-Cell-inputCollapser">
</div>
<div class="jp-InputArea jp-Cell-inputArea">
<div class="jp-InputPrompt jp-InputArea-prompt">In [10]:</div>
<div class="jp-CodeMirrorEditor jp-Editor jp-InputArea-editor" data-type="inline">
<div class="cm-editor cm-s-jupyter">
<div class="highlight hl-ipython3"><pre><span></span><span class="c1"># Label mapping op basis van median engagement_score</span>
<span class="n">tmp2</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">pd</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">DataFrame</span><span class="p">({</span>
    <span class="s2">"label"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">labels_phase2</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="s2">"engagement_score"</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">"engagement_score"</span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">})</span>


<span class="n">medians_phase2</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">tmp2</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">groupby</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">"label"</span><span class="p">)[</span><span class="s2">"engagement_score"</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">median</span><span class="p">()</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">sort_values</span><span class="p">()</span>

<span class="n">sorted_clusters2</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">medians_phase2</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">index</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">tolist</span><span class="p">()</span>

<span class="n">label_mapping_phase2</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">{</span>
    <span class="n">sorted_clusters2</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]:</span> <span class="s2">"Low engagement"</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">sorted_clusters2</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]:</span> <span class="s2">"Medium engagement"</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">sorted_clusters2</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">2</span><span class="p">]:</span> <span class="s2">"High engagement"</span>
<span class="p">}</span>

<span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">"engagement_cluster_phase2"</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">"cluster_label_phase2"</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="o">.</span><span class="n">map</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">label_mapping_phase2</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="p">)</span>

<span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">"engagement_cluster_phase2"</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">pd</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">Categorical</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">data</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">"engagement_cluster_phase2"</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">categories</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">"High engagement"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"Medium engagement"</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="s2">"Low engagement"</span><span class="p">],</span>
    <span class="n">ordered</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span>
<span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</div><div class="jp-Cell jp-CodeCell jp-Notebook-cell" id="cell-id=595c41f3266cd13f">
<div class="jp-Cell-inputWrapper" tabindex="0">
<div class="jp-Collapser jp-InputCollapser jp-Cell-inputCollapser">
</div>
<div class="jp-InputArea jp-Cell-inputArea">
<div class="jp-InputPrompt jp-InputArea-prompt">In [11]:</div>

</div><div class="jp-RenderedHTMLCommon jp-RenderedMarkdown jp-MarkdownOutput" data-mime-type="text/markdown">
<p>Deze figuur toont de verdeling van de engagement-clusters in trainingsfase 2.
De clusters zijn evenwichtig verdeeld en laten geen extreme scheefheid zien.
Dit bevestigt dat het toepassen van feature-weging geen onstabiele clustering veroorzaakt.</p>
